name: prism-monorepo
description: Prism adaptive Chrome learning copilot - hackathon monorepo

scripts.build: npm run build -w prism-shared && npm run build -w prism-verifiers && npm run build -w prism-curriculum && npm run build -w prism-learning-engine && npm run build -w prism-generation && npm run build -w prism-api-client && npm run build -w prism-web && npm run build:ui -w prism-web
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/verifiers/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/curriculum/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/learning-engine/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/generation/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/api-client/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/web/tsconfig.json
